analysis.doc: Synchronized from Linear issue identifier: POL-313

POL-313.title: IMPLEMENT: Ingest auto-promote with compact foreman notification
POL-313.body:
## Objective

Replace the manual candidate promotion gate in the SmartDocs ingest pipeline with ingest-owned auto-promotion to `doctrine/active/` and emit a compact informational notification record so the foreman has a lightweight audit trail per promotion.

## Context

[POL-312](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-312/analyze-ingest-auto-promote-with-compact-foreman-notification) (ANALYZE) identified that the candidate staging step in `ingestDocs()` is an unnecessary gate. Doctrine-classified docs currently land in `smartdocs/doctrine/candidate/` and require a human to run `polaris doctrine promote` to move them to `smartdocs/doctrine/active/`. [POL-180](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-180/fix-smart-docs-ingest-candidate-marker-handoff) (canceled) surfaced a marker handoff bug as a symptom of this design. The model should own the full ingest → active lifecycle; the foreman needs only a compact informational record per promotion, not a blocking review gate.

## Goal

Remove the `doctrine/candidate/` staging step from the ingest path. Doctrine-classified docs must be written directly to `smartdocs/doctrine/active/` on ingest, and a compact `doc-auto-promoted` telemetry event must be emitted per promotion so operators can audit what moved and when.

## Scope

* `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.ts`
* `src/smartdocs-engine/doctrine.ts`
* `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.test.ts`
* `src/smartdocs-engine/index.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `doctrine-candidate` classification routes directly to `smartdocs/doctrine/active/` (no intermediate candidate folder)
- [ ] `addCandidateFrontMatter` and candidate marker logic is removed from the doctrine ingest path
- [ ] A compact `doc-auto-promoted` telemetry event is emitted to the ingest run telemetry for every doctrine doc auto-promoted
- [ ] Integration tests cover the new auto-promote flow end-to-end
- [ ] `npm run build` and `npm test` pass

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/smartdocs-engine

## Ordering

Children execute in order:

1. POL-child-1: Remove candidate stage
2. POL-child-2: Implement auto-promote + compact notification event
3. POL-child-3: Integration test

## Non-goals

* Do not modify the `docs-promote` skill or its chain
* Do not change the `doctrine/active/` folder structure
* Do not remove `doctrinePromote()` — it may still be used by CLI consumers
* Do not implement any UI or reporting beyond the telemetry event

POL-312.title: ANALYZE: Ingest auto-promote with compact foreman notification

POL-180.title: Fix Smart Docs ingest candidate marker handoff

POL-316.title: Integration test: doctrine auto-promote end-to-end via ingestDocs
POL-316.body:
## Objective

Add integration tests to `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.test.ts` that verify the complete auto-promote flow: doctrine-classified docs land directly in `doctrine/active/`, no candidate folder is created, and the `doc-auto-promoted` telemetry event is emitted.

## Context

Part of [POL-313](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-313/implement-ingest-auto-promote-with-compact-foreman-notification) cluster. This is the final child — it verifies the combined output of [POL-314](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-314/remove-candidate-stage-from-doctrine-ingest-path) (candidate stage removal) and [POL-315](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-315/emit-compact-doc-auto-promoted-notification-event-on-doctrine-ingest) (notification event). Existing tests in `ingest.test.ts` may cover `doctrine-candidate` routing to the candidate folder; these must be updated or removed if they now conflict with the new behavior.

## Goal

Write or update tests in `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.test.ts` that assert:

1. A file whose content classifies as `"doctrine-candidate"` is placed in `smartdocs/doctrine/active/` (not `doctrine/candidate/`)
2. No file is written to `smartdocs/doctrine/candidate/` during ingest
3. The telemetry JSONL for the run contains a `doc-auto-promoted` event for the promoted file
4. Dry-run mode does not write to `doctrine/active/` or emit `doc-auto-promoted`

## Scope

* `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.test.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Test confirms doctrine-classified doc destination is `smartdocs/doctrine/active/<filename>`
- [ ] Test confirms `smartdocs/doctrine/candidate/` is not written to during ingest
- [ ] Test confirms `doc-auto-promoted` event exists in run telemetry JSONL
- [ ] Test confirms dry-run produces no file writes and no `doc-auto-promoted` event
- [ ] Any existing tests that assert the old `doctrine/candidate/` destination are updated to match the new behavior
- [ ] `npm test` passes

## Validation

* npm run build
* npm test
* npx vitest run src/smartdocs-engine

## Ordering

Depends on [POL-314](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-314/remove-candidate-stage-from-doctrine-ingest-path) and [POL-315](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-315/emit-compact-doc-auto-promoted-notification-event-on-doctrine-ingest) being Done first. This is the terminal child.

## Non-goals

* Do not test `doctrinePromote()` or `doctrineDraft()` CLI commands — those have their own tests
* Do not add tests outside `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.test.ts`

POL-315.title: Emit compact doc-auto-promoted notification event on doctrine ingest
POL-315.body:
## Objective

Emit a compact `doc-auto-promoted` telemetry event to the ingest run telemetry file each time a doctrine-classified document is written directly to `smartdocs/doctrine/active/`, so the foreman has a lightweight informational audit trail per promotion.

## Context

Part of [POL-313](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-313/implement-ingest-auto-promote-with-compact-foreman-notification) cluster. After [POL-314](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-314/remove-candidate-stage-from-doctrine-ingest-path) removes the candidate stage, doctrine docs land directly in `doctrine/active/`. This child wires the compact notification event so operators can audit what was promoted and when. The event must be informational only — it must not block ingest or cluster execution. The pattern follows the existing `cognition-maintenance-needed` and `doctrine-candidate-proposed` telemetry events already emitted in `ingestDocs()`.

## Goal

In `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.ts`, after a doctrine-classified doc is written to `smartdocs/doctrine/active/`, call `emitTelemetry()` with a `doc-auto-promoted` event containing: `file` (destination path), `classification`, `linked_map_area`, `cluster_id`, and `run_id`. The event shape must be compact — single JSON line, no nested objects.

## Scope

* `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] A `doc-auto-promoted` telemetry event is emitted in the ingest telemetry JSONL for each doctrine-classified doc written to `doctrine/active/`
- [ ] The event contains at minimum: `event`, `run_id`, `file`, `classification`, `linked_map_area`, `cluster_id`, `timestamp`
- [ ] The event is emitted after a successful file write (not on dry-run)
- [ ] Dry-run mode does not emit the event
- [ ] The notification does not block ingest execution on failure (best-effort, consistent with other telemetry calls)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/smartdocs-engine

## Ordering

Depends on [POL-314](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-314/remove-candidate-stage-from-doctrine-ingest-path) being Done first. POL-316 (integration test) depends on this being Done.

## Non-goals

* Do not add any return value or field to `IngestResult` for this event
* Do not write to any file other than the existing ingest telemetry JSONL
* Do not emit the event on dry-run

POL-314.title: Remove candidate stage from doctrine ingest path
POL-314.body:
## Objective

Remove the `doctrine/candidate/` staging step from `ingestDocs()` so that doctrine-classified documents no longer pass through an intermediate candidate folder.

## Context

Part of [POL-313](https://linear.app/lsctech/issue/POL-313/implement-ingest-auto-promote-with-compact-foreman-notification) cluster. Currently, when `classifyDoc()` returns `"doctrine-candidate"`, `ingestDocs()` routes the file to `smartdocs/doctrine/candidate/` and calls `addCandidateFrontMatter()` to stamp a `status: candidate` marker. This staging step is unnecessary — it requires a manual `polaris doctrine promote` invocation before the doc becomes active. This child removes that gate.

## Goal

Change the `TARGET_DIRS` entry for `"doctrine-candidate"` in `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.ts` to point to `smartdocs/doctrine/active/` and remove the call to `addCandidateFrontMatter()` in the ingest loop for doctrine-classified docs. The `addCandidateGovernanceMetadata()` call in `doctrine.ts` should also be removed from the ingest path (governance frontmatter is no longer needed at ingest time since there is no review gate).

## Scope

* `src/smartdocs-engine/ingest.ts`
* `src/smartdocs-engine/doctrine.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `TARGET_DIRS["doctrine-candidate"]` points to `smartdocs/doctrine/active/` (or the classification is renamed to `"doctrine-active"`)
- [ ] `addCandidateFrontMatter()` is no longer called during ingest for doctrine-classified docs
- [ ] `addCandidateGovernanceMetadata()` is no longer called during ingest
- [ ] No file is written to `smartdocs/doctrine/candidate/` during ingest
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

## Validation

* npm run build
* npx vitest run src/smartdocs-engine

## Ordering

Execute first. POL-child-2 (auto-promote notification) depends on this being Done.

## Non-goals

* Do not remove `addCandidateFrontMatter()` or `addCandidateGovernanceMetadata()` functions if they have other callers — only remove the call from the ingest path
* Do not modify `doctrinePromote()` or `doctrineDraft()` — CLI commands remain unchanged
* Do not write any tests in this child (covered by POL-child-3)
